source.manual: MoWT Road Design Manual Vol 3 Part I

description: Layer coefficients for AASHTO 93 structural number calculation as specified in MoWT Table 5.2. DSN = a1*h1 + a2*h2 + a3*h3 where thicknesses are in mm.

natural_or_crushed_gravel.notes: Natural gravel or crushed gravel base

crushed_stone_on_natural_gravel_subbase.notes: Crushed stone base over natural gravel subbase

crushed_stone_on_stabilised_subbase.notes: Crushed stone base over stabilised subbase

cement_treated_type_b.notes: Type B cement treated: 7-day UCS 2.0-3.5 MPa

cement_treated_type_c.notes: Type C cement treated: 7-day UCS 0.7-2.0 MPa

dsn_formula.units: Thicknesses (h) in mm. DSN is weighted structural number in mm-based units.
dsn_formula.conversion: To convert DSN to AASHTO SN (in inches): SN = DSN / 25.4
dsn_formula.extension: For a fourth pavement layer, extend equation by adding a4*h4

reliability_R.note: Higher reliability for more important roads

resilient_modulus_from_cbr.note: AASHTO approximation for subgrade resilient modulus from CBR
